entries.title:
This is being framed as an image model but it's actually @Meta's ad business in a new costume.

98% ...
entries.content:
This is being framed as an image model but it's actually [@Meta](https://x.com/Meta)'s ad business in a new costume.  
  
98% of Meta's Q1 revenue ($56.3B) comes from ads.  
  
Advantage+ is already cutting cost per lead for advertisers. And Muse Image goes into Advantage+ within weeks.  
  
[@finkd](https://x.com/finkd) basically told investors the goal is businesses just tell Meta what they want and how much they'll pay per result. Muse is what makes that work. You generate the creative for basically nothing. Test a thousand variants. Let the algorithm pick the winner.  
  
I think the part that should worry creative agencies is pretty obvious. If generating and testing ad images costs close to zero, what happens to the agencies charging $50K per campaign to do the same thing?  
  
Meta invested $14.3B in Scale AI and brought [@alexandr\_wang](https://x.com/alexandr_wang) in to lead their new lab. The first products from that lab are a consumer image tool and an ad pipeline. The ad pipeline is the one that pays for everything.

![Alexandr Wang](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1631421210205749248/uohbT_40_normal.jpg)

Alexandr Wang@alexandr\_wang

1/ releasing muse image today — the first image generation model from MSL. it's agentic: pairs with muse spark to reason through your prompt, search the web, and plan before it generates. people get what they meant on the first try. live now in the Meta AI app.

![Tweet Image](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMo6cW7WAAA6XLl.jpg)![Tweet Image](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMpNmi-W4AAUGuz.jpg)![Tweet Image](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMpNmjGXUAEI_jh.jpg)![Tweet Image](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMpNmi6WgAAui0d.jpg)

[🔗 View Quoted Tweet](https://x.com/alexandr_wang/status/2074555909347369105)

We've rolled out improvements to LlamaParse Cost Optimizer.

entries.content:
We've rolled out improvements to LlamaParse Cost Optimizer.   
  
Our intelligent tier routing now more reliably ensures you always strike the right balance between cost and accuracy when processing large documents. Simple pages default to our cost-effective tier, complex pages are still processed by our higher accuracy and higher cost agentic and agentic plus tiers.  
  
Only pay for the quality each page actually needs.  
  
Live now for all customers.

So what actually moves the bill? Reasoning effort, by a wide margin.

Detail swung accuracy 2 to 17 ...
entries.content:
So what actually moves the bill? Reasoning effort, by a wide margin.  
  
Detail swung accuracy 2 to 17 points while barely touching cost, while capping reasoning effort cut cost 50 to 75 percent with accuracy moving 1 to 2 points, within noise.

entries.title:
TLDR:

Reasoning models → keep detail on auto or high, control cost with reasoning effort

Non-reaso...
entries.content:
TLDR:  
  
Reasoning models → keep detail on auto or high, control cost with reasoning effort  
  
Non-reasoning models → low detail genuinely saves money and latency if you can absorb the accuracy hit  
  
Full benchmark with per-model tables and methodology: [openrouter.ai/blog/insights/…](https://openrouter.ai/blog/insights/image-detail-low-cost/)

entries.summary: OpenRouter总结：推理模型用高细节，非推理模型用低细节可省钱。

entries.title: We benchmarked 1,730 visual reasoning questions across 5 models to test a common cost-saving trick: ...
entries.content:
We benchmarked 1,730 visual reasoning questions across 5 models to test a common cost-saving trick: setting image detail to "low."  
  
Surprise finding: it often backfires. The model burns extra reasoning tokens squinting at a blurry image, and overall cost increases 👇

![Tweet Image](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMpu8SZXoAAkzst.jpg)

entries.title:
Meta Muse Video just entered the Video Arena at #3.

@AIatMeta’s new video model scored 1459 in the ...
entries.content:
Meta Muse Video just entered the Video Arena at #3.  
  
[@AIatMeta](https://x.com/AIatMeta)’s new video model scored 1459 in the Text-to-Video Arena. It outperforms Alibaba’s HappyHorse 1.0 by +30pts and ranks ahead of Grok Imagine, Sora 2 Pro and Google Veo-3.1 models.  
  
Meta has now reached the video AI frontier - congrats to the Meta team on this big milestone!

![Tweet Image](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HMptmJraoAArKfP.jpg)

![AI at Meta](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1454145678075117568/2qXqM_Cu_normal.png)

AI at Meta@AIatMeta

Introducing Muse Image and Muse Video, the first media generation models developed by Meta Superintelligence Labs.  
  
Muse Image is our most advanced image generation model yet. It follows instructions faithfully, edits with precision, composes from multiple references, and draws on Instagram for social context. It also brings agentic tool use capabilities to image generation and integrates with Muse Spark.  
  
You can try Muse Image in the Meta AI app and web, as well as in Instagram Stories and WhatsApp – starting in limited countries with more locations on the way.  
  
Today we’re also previewing Muse Video, which is built upon the same pretraining base as Muse Image to deliver exceptional visual fidelity with native audio support.  
  
Learn more about both models: [go.meta.me/7f4427](https://go.meta.me/7f4427)
